name: rhodawk-hermes
description: Rhodawk AI — Hermes Autonomous Architect multi-agent swarm

scripts.check-node: node -e "const v=process.versions.node.split('.');if(v[0]<20){console.error('ERROR: Node.js 20+ required, got '+process.versions.node);process.exit(1);}console.log('Node.js '+process.versions.node+' OK — Nullish Coalescing (??) supported');"

comments.node-version-note: Node.js 12.x (Ubuntu 22.04 default) does NOT support the Nullish Coalescing operator (??) used by MCP servers and openclaude. Always install Node.js 20+ via NodeSource (setup_24.x is used in Dockerfiles). The Dockerfile and Dockerfile.vps both enforce this via `curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_24.x | bash -`.
comments.hermes-agent-note: hermes-agent is a Python package installed via requirements.txt. The importable module name is `hermes_agent`, NOT `hermes` or `gateway`. The CLI entry point is `hermes-agent`.
